description: Compile-only firmware validation targets (FW-COMPILE-MATRIX-001). Source-of-truth list of product YAMLs that CI may compile to validate YAML / config / codegen buildability before hardware is available. This file is a CI validation lane only: compile success is necessary but not sufficient for preview / stable readiness. It does not expose new WebFlash builds, create release artifacts, import firmware, promote any product, or add any product YAML. See docs/compile-only-firmware-validation.md.

targets.reason: Currently committed Release-One stable WebFlash build. Compile-only validation pins that the canonical Release-One YAML still composes / substitutes / includes / generates code cleanly under the current ESPHome version, independent of hardware availability.
targets.notes: Verified-for-release-one product (config/product-catalog.json status=production, webflash_build_matrix=true). This compile-only target does NOT add a new WebFlash exposure, flip webflash_build_matrix, or change the committed build entry; it only validates buildability.

targets.reason: Currently committed LED-bearing preview WebFlash build. Compile-only validation pins that the LED-bearing canonical YAML still composes / substitutes / includes / generates code cleanly under the current ESPHome version, independent of hardware availability. Compile success is not LED-stable proof; the LED stable gauntlet (S360-300-BENCH-001, WF-HW-TEST-001, WF-HW-TEST-003, RELEASE-007) remains open.
targets.notes: Preview-only product (config/product-catalog.json status=preview, channel=preview, webflash_build_matrix=true). This compile-only target does NOT promote the LED preview to stable, change the committed build entry, or claim hardware proof exists.

targets.reason: POE non-fan compile-confidence target (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001). Validates the minimum Core ceiling + PoE PSU + base + health package composition that the WebFlash-shipping Release-One build already proves compiles. Compile success is not WebFlash exposure, not a release artifact, not S360-410 schematic verification, not Release-One PoE caveat closure, and not product-catalog / stable / preview promotion.
targets.notes: Skeleton lives under products/compile-only/ so the top-level product-catalog enumeration gate at tests/test_product_catalog.py::_top_level_product_yamls does not require a config/product-catalog.json entry. No webflash_wrapper, no artifact_name, no entry in config/webflash-builds.json.

targets.reason: POE non-fan compile-confidence target (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001). Validates the Core ceiling + PoE PSU + RoomIQ (comfort_ceiling + presence_ceiling) package composition stripped of VentIQ. Same RoomIQ subset that the WebFlash-shipping Release-One build already exercises. Compile success is not WebFlash exposure, not a release artifact, and not product-catalog / stable / preview promotion.
targets.notes: Skeleton lives under products/compile-only/ so the top-level product-catalog enumeration gate does not require a config/product-catalog.json entry. No webflash_wrapper, no artifact_name, no entry in config/webflash-builds.json.

targets.reason: POE non-fan compile-confidence target (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001). Validates the Core ceiling + PoE PSU + VentIQ (airiq_bathroom_base + bathroom_profile) package composition stripped of RoomIQ. Same VentIQ subset that the WebFlash-shipping Release-One build already exercises. Compile success is not WebFlash exposure, not a release artifact, and not product-catalog / stable / preview promotion.
targets.notes: Skeleton lives under products/compile-only/ so the top-level product-catalog enumeration gate does not require a config/product-catalog.json entry. No webflash_wrapper, no artifact_name, no entry in config/webflash-builds.json.

targets.reason: POE non-fan compile-confidence target (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001). Validates the Core ceiling + PoE PSU + AirIQ (airiq_ceiling + airiq_basic_profile) package composition. The AirIQ + comfort + presence package composition is already proven expressible by products/sense360-core-ceiling.yaml. Compile success is not WebFlash exposure, not a release artifact, and not AirIQ stable / preview promotion.
targets.notes: Skeleton lives under products/compile-only/ so the top-level product-catalog enumeration gate does not require a config/product-catalog.json entry. No webflash_wrapper, no artifact_name, no entry in config/webflash-builds.json. AirIQ and VentIQ are mutually exclusive; this target uses AirIQ.

targets.reason: POE non-fan compile-confidence target (FW-COMPILE-POE-NONFAN-001). Validates the Core ceiling + PoE PSU + AirIQ + RoomIQ package composition. The AirIQ + comfort + presence composition is already proven expressible by products/sense360-core-ceiling.yaml. Compile success is not WebFlash exposure, not a release artifact, and not AirIQ stable / preview promotion.
targets.notes: Skeleton lives under products/compile-only/ so the top-level product-catalog enumeration gate does not require a config/product-catalog.json entry. No webflash_wrapper, no artifact_name, no entry in config/webflash-builds.json. AirIQ and VentIQ are mutually exclusive; this target uses AirIQ.
